botcomponent.description: Regulatory compliance validator enforcing CMS Medicare rules, FDA 2025 guidelines (medical devices, AI-enabled systems, sex-specific data requirements), HIPAA Privacy/Security Rules, and state regulations. Audits documentation quality, identifies regulatory violations, assigns risk scores, and flags denial patterns. Validates against current FY2025 ICD-10-CM coding standards and Medicare necessity thresholds.
botcomponent.name: Compliance_Auditor
